message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): SSI witness objects + hot/cold plane discovery (bd-1if1)

§5.7.1 canonical ECS schemas: KeySummary (6 variants), EcsReadWitness,
EcsWriteWitness, WitnessDelta (CRDT union-only), EcsDependencyEdge,
EcsCommitProof, AbortWitness. §5.7.2 two-stage candidate discovery:
hot_plane_discover (O(1) bitset, no false negatives) and cold_plane_refine
(witness decode to reduce false positives). 12 tests.

Also includes: rowid_alloc module integration, unix.rs mut fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
